title: Wynnforest
description: Custom flora themed resource pack for Wynncraft
body:
# Wynnforest Resource Pack
This is wynnforest! If you have seen this on wynnmain or in famous Wynntuber Wintel's videos, this used to be HSP GUI. This is a public release version of that same resource pack!

This pack overhauls various guis and features including:
- Changing the primary GUI to be tree and leaf themed
- Custom VFX for your ultimate being charged
- Unique ability tree, divider, panorama, and more
- Cool little secret in the Aelumia University Library Secret Discovery

This pack also overhauls some wynntils textures for those who use the mod!

Thank you so much for supporting the pack, I know everyone wanted this (probably) for a while.
